case_title: BEN YAO VS. ELENA LAUCHUNG ET AL

REMOVED FROM JURY TRIAL CALENDAR ON DEC-11-2020 IN DEPT. DEPARTMENT 303 - JURY FINDS IN FAVOR OF PLAINTIFF. COUNSEL TO SUBMIT JUDGMENT TO THE COURT AND OPPOSING COUNSEL FOR REVIEW AND SIGNATURE. JUDGE: HONORABLE RUSS ROECA; CLERK: JOHNNY SENGMANY; REPORTER: JAVS (D303).

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ON VERDICT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF YAO, BEN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LAUCHUNG, ELENA JUDGMENT AS FOLLOWS: FORFEITURE OF THE RENTAL AGREEMENT; POSSESSION OF 430A 35TH AVENUE, SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94121, THE SUBJECT PREMISES, BE RESTORED TO PLAINTIFF; THE CLERK OF THIS COURT TO ISSUE A WRIT OF POSSESSION DIRECTING THAT THE SHERIFF FOR THIS COUNTY REMOVE DEFENDANT ELENA LAUCHUNG, AND OCCUPANTS FROM THE ABOVE-DESCRIBED PREMISES (SEE SCANNED DOC)
NOTICE TO DEFENDANTS
ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF JURY FEE AND EXPENSES PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52 AS TO DEFENDANT LAUCHUNG, ELENA

MINUTES FOR NOV-24-2020 9:45 AM

JAVS MINUTES FOR DECEMBER 2, 2020
ORDER PRETRIAL
JAVS MINUTES FOR DECEMBER 3 2020

JURY TRIAL SET FOR DEC-08-2020 CONTINUED TO DEC-09-2020 AT 8:00 AM IN DEPARTMENT 303. COUNSEL TO MEET AND CONFER ON EXHIBITS. THE COURT WILL TAKE UP ISSUES REGARDING EXHIBITS IN THE MORNING PRIOR TO JURY'S ARRIVAL. JUDGE: HONORABLE RUSS ROECA; CLERK: JOHNNY SENGMANY; REPORTER: JAVS (D220).
JURY INSTRUCTIONS GIVEN
TRIAL CONCLUDED. IN 3 DAYS
